name: Set Cargo Ship Speed
description: Controls the movement speed of the Cargo Ship.

name: Set Cargo Ship Egress Duration
description: Controls how long the Cargo Ship takes to leave the map.

name: Set Cargo Ship Event Duration
description: Controls how long the Cargo Ship remains active.

name: Toggle Cargo Ship Event
description: Enables or disables the Cargo Ship event.

name: Set Cargo Ship Loot Spacing
description: Controls the time between locked crate spawns on Cargo Ship.

name: Set Cargo Ship Loot Rounds
description: Controls how many locked crate rounds occur on Cargo Ship.

name: Toggle Cargo Ship Scientists
description: Enables or disables scientist spawning on Cargo Ship.

name: Start Cargo Ship Egress
description: Forces the Cargo Ship to leave the map.

name: Trigger Event
description: Starts a specified event.

name: Stop Event
description: Stops a specified event.

name: Toggle Bradley APC
description: Enables or disables Bradley APC spawning.

name: Toggle Bradley Quick Respawn
description: Enables or disables quick respawn for Bradley APC.

name: Set Bradley Respawn Delay
description: Controls the respawn delay for Bradley APC.

name: Set Bradley Respawn Variance
description: Controls the respawn variance for Bradley APC.

name: Set Heli Accuracy
description: Controls Patrol Helicopter bullet accuracy.

name: Set Heli Damage Scale
description: Scales Patrol Helicopter damage output.

name: Set Chinook Drop Zone
description: Sets the monument used for the next locked crate drop.

name: Get Event Remaining Time
description: Displays the remaining time for an active event.

name: Set Event Cooldown Multiplier
description: Scales the cooldown time of an event.

name: Get Event Cooldown
description: Displays the cooldown time of an event.

name: Disable Event
description: Disables a specified event.

name: List Active Events
description: Displays all active events on the server.

name: Start Special Event
description: Starts a special server event.

name: Pause Special Event
description: Pauses the active special event.

name: Stop Special Event
description: Stops a special event.

name: List Special Events
description: Displays all available special events.

name: Set Scarecrow Damage Scale
description: Scales body damage dealt to scarecrows.

name: Toggle Scarecrow Beancans
description: Enables or disables scarecrow beancan throwing.

name: Set Xmas Gifts Per Player
description: Controls how many presents spawn per player during Xmas events.
